test_patch:
diff --git a/tests/test_txenrich2_boundaries.py b/tests/test_txenrich2_boundaries.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..1111111
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/test_txenrich2_boundaries.py
@@ -0,0 +1,163 @@
+"""Boundary / edge-case correctness for bank-transaction enrichment.
+
+These assert correct labels on exact-length, sentinel-amount, fixed-layout and
+account-type edge inputs that the broader enrichment flow never exercises: a
+cheque-deposit remark that is a bare instrument number of the exact digit width
+the rule accepts, a rupee-one account-verification credit, a payroll credit
+whose payee sits in the final segment of a dash-delimited reference layout, a
+bulk-posting whose payee is only extracted for one account type, and a
+structured internet-banking transfer whose payee comes from a specific capture
+group. Ordinary transactions feed values comfortably away from these edges, so
+a boundary regression here stays invisible to them.
+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+
+import pandas as pd
+
+from categorizationapp.BankScripts.Kotak import categorize_Kotak_transactions
+from categorizationapp.BankScripts.SBI import categorize_SBI_transactions
+
+
+def _row(**over):
+    row = {
+        "description": "NEUTRALNARR",
+        "type": "CREDIT",
+        "amount": 5000.0,
+        "balanceAfterTransaction": 10000.0,
+        "remark": "",
+    }
+    row.update(over)
+    return row
+
+
+def _kotak(rows, account_type="SAVING"):
+    return categorize_Kotak_transactions(pd.DataFrame(rows).copy(), account_type)
+
+
+def _sbi(rows, account_type="SAVING"):
+    return categorize_SBI_transactions(pd.DataFrame(rows).copy(), account_type)
+
+
+# --- fail_to_pass: one per planted defect (mutually disjoint) -------------
+
+class TestChequeDepositRemarkLength(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_five_digit_remark_credit_is_cheque_deposit(self):
+        out = _kotak([_row(description="RANDOMXYZNARR", type="CREDIT",
+                           remark="12345")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT")
+
+
+class TestReceivedFromVerification(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_rupee_one_received_from_is_account_verification(self):
+        out = _kotak([_row(description="Received from JOHN", type="CREDIT",
+                           amount=1.0)])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0],
+                         "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION")
+
+
+class TestNachSalaryPayeeSegment(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_nach_salary_payee_is_final_segment(self):
+        out = _kotak([_row(description="NACH-SAL-CR-SAL-EMPLOYER NAME",
+                           type="CREDIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "Employer Name")
+
+
+class TestBulkPostingSavingsPayee(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_bulk_posting_payee_in_savings_account(self):
+        out = _sbi([_row(description="BULK POSTING-ACME CORP", type="CREDIT")],
+                   account_type="SAVING")
+        self.assertEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "Acme Corp")
+
+
+class TestInbTransferPayeeExtraction(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_inb_transfer_payee_group(self):
+        out = _sbi([_row(description="TO TRANSFER INB JOHN DOE", type="DEBIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "John Doe")
+
+
+# --- pass_to_pass: pin adjacent correct behavior (green at both states) ----
+
+class TestChequeDepositRemarkPins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_four_digit_remark_still_cheque_deposit(self):
+        out = _kotak([_row(description="RANDOMXYZNARR", type="CREDIT",
+                           remark="1234")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT")
+
+    def test_six_digit_remark_is_not_cheque_deposit(self):
+        out = _kotak([_row(description="RANDOMXYZNARR", type="CREDIT",
+                           remark="123456")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "TRANSFER")
+
+
+class TestVerificationPins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_non_sentinel_received_from_is_imps(self):
+        out = _kotak([_row(description="Received from JOHN", type="CREDIT",
+                           amount=500.0)])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "IMPS")
+
+    def test_karz_rupee_one_still_verification(self):
+        out = _kotak([_row(description="Karz Xx4002 something", type="CREDIT",
+                           amount=1.0)])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0],
+                         "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION")
+
+
+class TestNachSalaryPins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_sibling_nach_credit_payee_segment(self):
+        out = _kotak([_row(description="NACH-ABCD-CR-DESC-VENDOR NAME",
+                           type="CREDIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "Desc")
+
+    def test_nach_salary_category_still_auto_credit(self):
+        out = _kotak([_row(description="NACH-SAL-CR-SAL-EMPLOYER NAME",
+                           type="CREDIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "AUTO_CREDIT")
+
+
+class TestBulkPostingPins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_current_account_bulk_posting_payee_empty(self):
+        out = _sbi([_row(description="BULK POSTING-ACME CORP", type="CREDIT")],
+                   account_type="CURRENT")
+        self.assertEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "")
+
+    def test_digit_bulk_posting_payee_empty(self):
+        out = _sbi([_row(description="BULK POSTING-9999 SALARY", type="CREDIT")],
+                   account_type="SAVING")
+        self.assertEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "")
+
+    def test_bulk_posting_category_holds(self):
+        out = _sbi([_row(description="BULK POSTING-ACME CORP", type="CREDIT")],
+                   account_type="SAVING")
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "BULK_POSTING")
+
+
+class TestInbTransferPins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_inb_transfer_category_holds(self):
+        out = _sbi([_row(description="TO TRANSFER INB JOHN DOE", type="DEBIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "INTERNET_BANKING")
+
+    def test_upi_payee_extraction_unaffected(self):
+        out = _sbi([_row(description="TRANSFER TO 4897687/UPI/somebank/JANE SMITH",
+                         type="DEBIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "Jane Smith")
+
+
+class TestGeneralCategoryPins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_kotak_imps_category(self):
+        out = _kotak([_row(description="IMPS from JOHN Ref123", type="CREDIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "IMPS")
+
+    def test_sbi_atm_withdrawal_category(self):
+        out = _sbi([_row(description="ATM WDL 12345", type="DEBIT",
+                         amount=250.0)])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "ATM_WITHDRAWAL")
+
+    def test_kotak_card_payment_category(self):
+        out = _kotak([_row(description="PCD SOMESHOP RETAIL", type="DEBIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "CARD_PAYMENT")
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
